channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Dominoes are steadily falling in the path of the rate cuts Trump wants from Kevin Warsh
item.description: "In his confirmation hearing, Warsh testified that 'inflation is a choice.' He may get the chance to prove he actually believes it."

item.title: China dominates the minerals that power AI, but one company claims enough supply on the ocean floor for hundreds of years
item.description: Potato-sized mineral balls on the ocean floor may help reduce U.S. reliance on Chinese minerals.

item.title: Before 'Star Wars' made him a multimillionaire, Harrison Ford struggled to make ends meet, so he spent 15 years working a trades side-gig
item.description: Before becoming Han Solo and earning $1,000 a week, Harrison Ford worked as a woodworker for 15 years to pay the bills.

item.title: The new American Dream no longer resides in big cities. It is found in Celina, Texas.
item.description: According to the Census Bureau, the fastest-growing areas in the U.S. are small exurban towns near Dallas and Houston.
